recent_rejected_plans.reason: Rejected candidate because score delta was -0.0392

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Read small localized nutrition information or food label text from an image, identify the relevant nutrient value and unit basis, then apply arithmetic scaling or intake-target calculations to answer a counting question.
supported_variations: Extract per-serving, per-100g, or per-volume nutrient values from package labels and scale them to a stated quantity
Use the visually identified food item together with externally specified reference nutrition targets or nutrient-content sources to compute required grams or total nutrient intake
unsupported_variations: Cases requiring unsupported external web browsing or unverifiable source retrieval beyond the provided prompt context
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode a specific product, fruit, nutrient, or label layout
Do not rely on fixed image coordinates or one-off crop regions
Do not assume the nutrition basis is always per 100g or always per bottle
Do not assume English-only text or a single standardized nutrition table format
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: Failures concentrate on missing support for reading small localized label text, while the downstream reasoning is stable arithmetic over extracted nutrition values, making a reusable zoom/read primitive plus a lightweight reasoning skill broadly applicable across the cluster.

recent_rejected_plans.reason: Rejected candidate because score delta was 0.0000

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Read nutrition-related values from localized package text or depicted food labels, then perform unit-based arithmetic to answer counting or intake questions.
supported_variations: Extracting per-serving or per-volume nutrition values from small localized text and scaling to a stated quantity
Using visually identified food type plus externally provided reference values to compute required grams or nutrient totals
unsupported_variations: Cases requiring domain-specific medical judgment, personalized dietary advice beyond straightforward reference-based calculation, or unsupported external web lookup without provided values
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode a specific beverage, fruit, or nutrient type
Do not assume fixed label layout, text position, or one-off coordinates
Do not assume values are always per 100g, per serving, or per bottle without reading the visual/text evidence
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: Failures are driven mainly by not extracting small localized visual text before doing simple arithmetic; a reusable perception-plus-calculation skill can cover multiple nutrition counting variants without overfitting to one product.

recent_rejected_plans.reason: Rejected candidate because score delta was -0.0392

coverage_contract.problem_pattern: Image questions require extracting localized visual details, especially small or region-specific text/attributes, but failures come from not invoking any focused perception step.
supported_variations: Reading event/team names or other localized text from a photo region before answering a free-form question
Inspecting a specific object or region to describe an attribute, mood, count, or other visible property
unsupported_variations: Tasks needing external world knowledge beyond what is visually present in the image
forbidden_case_specific_assumptions: Do not hardcode a specific sports event, team names, or object category from one example
Do not rely on fixed coordinates, fixed crop locations, or one-off image layouts
Do not assume the answer is always text; first determine whether the question targets text, count, or visual attributes
coverage_contract.why_this_should_generalize: The dominant failure mode is procedural—failing to focus on the relevant image region or use available perception tools—so a reusable skill for targeted region inspection and tool selection should improve many family variants.
